button.itemMenu.guestPawn.sendToBag: Send to {isMe, select, true{your} other{{player}'s}} bag
button.itemMenu.movieCard.buyCardDestina: Buy for the {destination, select, 0{left} 1{center} 2{right} other{}} theater
button.itemMenu.theaterTile.buyTileDesti: Buy for the {destination, select, 0{left} 1{center} 2{right} other{}} theater
header.actionRules.chooseMovieAction.you: You must choose an available movie action or <pass/>
header.actionRules.chooseMovieAction.pla: {player} must choose an available movie action or pass
Players must choose an available movie action or pass
header.actionRules.chooseSeatAction.you: You must choose whether to perform the seat action or <pass/>
header.actionRules.chooseSeatAction.play: {player} must choose whether to perform the seat action or pass
Players must choose whether to perform the seat action or pass
header.actionRules.discardAwardCard.you: You must place one of the two award cards you received under the deck²
header.actionRules.discardAwardCard.play: {player} must place one of the two award cards they received under the deck
Players must place one of the two award cards they received under the deck
header.actionRules.pickReserveOrExitZone: You must send a white Guest to the bag of any player
{player} must send a white Guest to the bag of any player
Players must send a white Guest to the bag of any player
You must take a {colorEnum, select, 1{blue} 2{green} 3{red} 5{yellow} 4{any coloured} other{}} Guest from the reserve or an exit zone and put it in your bag
{player} must take a {colorEnum, select, 1{blue} 2{green} 3{red} 5{yellow} 4{any colored} other{}} Guest from the reserve or another exit zone and put it in their bag
Players must take a {colorEnum, select, 1{blue} 2{green} 3{red} 5{yellow} 4{any colored} other{}} Guest from the reserve or another exit zone and put it in their bag
header.actionRules.pickTheaterTileToActi: You must pick a theater tile to activate or <pass/>
{player} must pick a theater tile to activate or pass
Players must pick a theater tile to activate or pass
header.actionRules.PlaceCinemaGuestInRes: You must send a guest from your cinema or exit zone to the reserve
{player} must send a guest from their cinema or exit zone to the reserve
Players must send a guest from their cinema or exit zone to the reserve
header.actionRules.placeExitZoneGuestInB: You must put a Guest from your exit zone into your bag
{player} must put a Guest from your exit zone into their bag
Players must put a Guest from your exit zone into their bag
header.actionRules.placeGuests.you: You must place your {guestsNumber, plural, =1{Guest} other{Guests}} inside your theaters
header.actionRules.placeGuests.player: {player} must place their {guestsNumber, plural, =1{Guest} other{Guests}} inside their theaters
header.actionRules.placeGuests.players: Players must place their Guests inside their theaters
header.buyingPhase.firstTurn.you: You can buy a movie or <pass/>
header.buyingPhase.firstTurn.player: {player} can buy a movie or pass
header.buyingPhase.you: You can buy a movie, a theater, activate an advertising token or <pass/>
header.buyingPhase.player: {player} can buy a movie, a theater, activate an advertising token or pass
header.endOfRoundPhaseNewLinup.players: New lineup: Features are discarded, Premiers become Features, new movies are provided
header.endOfRoundPhaseTheatricalRun.play: Theatrical run: lobby sliders move one space up
header.finalEndOfRoundPhaseAdvertisingTo: You can move advertising tokens to coloured Guest spots or get them back or <pass/>
{player} can move advertising tokens to coloured Guest spots or get them back or pass
Players can move advertising tokens to coloured Guest spots or get them back or pass
header.showingsPhase.players: Players must finish their showings phase
help.location.awardCard.otherHand.title: {name}'s award cards hand
help.location.awardCard.otherHand.descri: {name}'s award card hand. Currently, {name} has {count, plural, =1{1 award card} other{# award cards}} in their hand²
help.location.awardCard.deck.title: Award cards deck
help.location.awardCard.deck.description: Deck of award cards. The <action /> movie action allows a player to draw two cards, and keep one of them in their hand, and put the other back below the deck. Currently, there are {count} cards in the deck.
help.location.guestPawn.exitZone.title: {player}'s exit zone
help.location.guestPawn.exitZone.descrip: Once a Guest has finished their actions, {player} places it here. There {numberOfGuests, plural, =0{are currently no Guests} =1{is currently # Guest} other{are currently # Guests}} in {player}'s exit zone.
help.location.guestPawn.reserve.title: Guest Pawn reserve
help.location.guestPawn.reserve.descript: Using the <movieAction/> Movie Action, players can send Guests pawns back to the reserve. They can pick a Guest from the reserve using Advertising Tokens on the <boardHelpLink>Advertising Board</boardHelpLink>. There {numberOfGuests, plural, =0{are currently no Guests} =1{is currently # Guest} other{are currently # Guests}} in the reserve.
help.location.guestPawn.showingsGuest.de: {player} must place Guests in their theaters
help.location.guestPawn.showingsGuest.mo: Place Guest on {destinationSeat, select, 0{first} 1{second} 2{third} other{}} seat of {destinationTile, select, 0{left} 1{center} 2{right} other{}} theater
help.location.moneyToken.playerPile.desc: {player} currently owns ${amount}. If {player} owned that amount at the end of the game, they would earn {popcornAmount} Popcorn (<popcorn/>)
help.location.movieCard.deck.title: Movie card deck
help.location.movieCard.deck.description: Deck of movie cards.{finalShowingsLocation, plural, =0{} other{ <link>The final showing card</link> is located # cards before the end.}}
help.location.movieCard.yourArchive.desc: When you buy a new movie, the replaced movie is sent here, in this archive. There {numberOfMovies, plural, =0{are currently no Movies} =1{is currently # Movie} other{are currently # Movies}} in your archive.
help.location.theaterTile.deck.title: {numberOfSeats, select, 1{One seat} 2{Two seats} 3{Three seats} other{}} theater tiles stack
help.location.theaterTile.deck.descripti: Stack of {numberOfSeats, select, 1{one seat} 2{two seats} 3{three seats} other{}} theater tiles. Once a player buys a theater tile below, a new tile is immediately taken from the stack if there is one available. Currently, there {numberOfTiles, plural, =0{are no tiles} =1{is 1 tile} other{are # tiles}} in the stack
help.material.advertisingBoard.title: Advertising board
help.material.advertisingBoard.descripti: Players place their advertising tokens on the board as the result of a movie action or a showing bonus.
help.material.advertisingBoard.spot.anyG: Take 1 Guest of any color from the reserve (or, if there aren’t any, from any other player’s exit zone) and add it to your bag. If there are none available, nothing happens.
help.material.advertisingBoard.spot.colo: Take 1 {guestColor} Guest from the reserve (or, if there aren’t any, from any other player’s exit zone) and add it to your bag. If there are none available, nothing happens.
help.material.advertisingBoard.spot.plac: Take 1 white Guest from the reserve or your cinema (in a theater or in the exit zone), then add it to any player’s bag (including your own). If there are none available, nothing happens
help.material.advertisingToken.title: {player}'s Advertising token
help.material.advertisingToken.descripti: {player} can use Movie actions to put this token on the <boardLink>Advertising board</boardLink>
help.material.awardCard.title: <awardCardTitle/> — <location/>
help.material.awardCard.description.audi: If your audience is greater than or equal to 6, gain 4 Popcorn.
help.material.awardCard.description.blue: For each pair of 1 blue Guest and 1 green Guest, gain 2 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 blue movie and 1 green movie, gain 2 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 red movie and 1 blue movie, gain 2 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 blue seat and 1 red seat, gain 3 Popcorn (seats can be in different theaters).
For each set of 2 blue Guests, 2 blue movies, and 2 blue seats, gain 4 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 blue Guest and 1 yellow Guest, gain 2 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 blue seat and 1 yellow seat, gain 3 Popcorn (seats can be in different theaters).
help.material.awardCard.description.four: For each set of 4 movies of the same color (red, green, yellow, or blue), gain 5 Popcorn.
For each set of 4 movies of different colors, gain 4 Popcorn.
For each set of 4 seats of different colors, gain 6 Popcorn (seats can be in different theaters).
help.material.awardCard.description.gree: For each pair of 1 green Guest and 1 red Guest, gain 2 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 green seat and 1 red seat, gain 3 Popcorn (seats can be in different theaters).
For each set of 2 green Guests, 2 green movies, and 2 green seats, gain 4 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 green movie and 1 yellow movie, gain 2 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 green seat and 1 yellow seat, gain 3 Popcorn (seats can be in different theaters).
help.material.awardCard.description.gues: If you have 6 or fewer Guests (no matter which colors) at the end of the game, gain 5 Popcorn. If you have 7 or 8, gain 3 Popcorn.
help.material.awardCard.description.movi: For each movie that costs $0 or $1, gain 1 Popcorn (Starting Movies do not count).
For each movie that costs $4 or $5, gain 2 Popcorn
help.material.awardCard.description.RedT: For each set of 2 red Guests, 2 red movies, and 2 red seats, gain 4 Popcorn.
help.material.awardCard.description.RedY: For each pair of 1 red Guest and 1 yellow Guest, gain 2 Popcorn.
For each pair of 1 red movie and 1 yellow movie, gain 2 Popcorn.
help.material.awardCard.description.Thre: For each 3-seat theater in your cinema, gain 2 Popcorn.
help.material.awardCard.description.TwoF: For each set of 2 Guests of each color (red, green, yellow, and blue), gain 5 Popcorn.
help.material.awardCard.description.Whit: If you have 0 white Guests, gain 7 Popcorn. If you have 1 or 2, gain 4.
help.material.awardCard.description.Yell: For each set of 2 yellow Guests, 2 yellow movies, and 2 yellow seats, gain 4 Popcorn.
help.material.clothBag.title: {player}'s Guest cloth bag
help.material.clothBag.description: {player} draws their Guests from the bag. When {player} needs to draw guests and the bag is empty, {player} places all their exit zone Guests in the bag before drawing the remaining Guests.{isMine, select, true{ There {numberOfGuests, plural, =0{are currently no Guests} =1{is currently # Guest} other{are currently # Guests}} in the bag.} other{}}
help.material.featureTile.title: Features tile
help.material.featureTile.description:
If you buy a movie from the Features row, its cost is as shown on the card.

During the end of the round, movies in the features row are discarded.
help.material.firstPlayerToken.title: First player token
help.material.firstPlayerToken.descripti: The player having this token is the first to begin this round's <s>Buying Phase</s>
help.material.guestPawn.title: {player}'s {guestColor} Guest <nl/>{theater, select, 0{left} 1{center} 2{right} other{}} theater — {seatNumber, select, 0{first} 1{second} 2{third} other{}} seat
help.material.guestPawn.description.seat: <guest/> can{canDoSeatAction, select, true{} other{not}} activate seat{canDoSeatAction, select, false{ (as the guest color is not the same as the seat color ({seatColor})} other{}} and perform <seatAction/>.
help.material.guestPawn.description.movi: <guest/> can{canDoMovieAction, select, true{} other{not}} perform an available movie action for <movie/> {canDoMovieAction, select, false{(as the Guest color is not the same as the movie color({movieColor}))} other{}}.
help.material.helpCard.action.title: Actions reminder
help.material.helpCard.action.advertisin: Place 1 Advertising token on the corresponding space of the board
Gain 1 Guest of this color and add it to your bag
Gain 1 Guest of any color and add it to your bag.
help.material.helpCard.action.exitGuestT: Add 1 Guest from your exit zone to your bag
help.material.helpCard.action.reserve: Place 1 of your Guests in the reserve
help.material.helpCard.action.drawGuest: Place 1 of your Guests in the reserve
help.material.helpCard.action.whiteGuest: Add 1 white Guest to any player's bag
help.material.helpCard.phases.title: Turn Overview
help.material.helpCard.phases.buyingAdve: Buying and Advertising (in turn order){currentPhase, plural, =1{ (current phase)} other{}}
All actions are optional and can be taken in any order:<nl/><ls><lit>Buy 1 movie + Showing bonus</lit><lit>Buy 1 theater</lit><lit>Activate Advertising tokens</lit></ls>
help.material.helpCard.phases.showings.d: <ols><lit>Open Cinema: Draw Guests according to your audience <audiencePicture /></lit><lit>Place Guests <e>(pay attention to seat order)</e></lit><lit>Seat and Movie actions <e>(choose the order of theater)</e><nl/><uls><lit>Activate a Guest <e>(in seat order)</e><nl/>One at a time: Seat action <arr/> Movie action <arr/> Exit
help.material.helpCard.phases.endOfRound: End of Round{currentPhase, plural, =1{ (current phase)} other{}}
help.material.lobbySlider.title: {player}'s {theater, select, 0{left} 1{center} 2{right} other{}} theater lobby slider
help.material.lobbySlider.description: During the theatrical run (part of the End of Round), this Lobby Sider will move 1 space up {isMovieAvailable, select, true{on <movieLink/>} other{on the Movie Card in the {theater, select, 0{center} 1{left} 2{right} other{}} theater when there will be one}}, covering 1 more action. Covered actions are no longer available in future rounds.
help.material.moneyToken.title: Money token
help.material.moneyToken.description: This token represents ${amount}. Money is used to buy movie cards and theater tiles. At the end of the game, players earn 1 Popcorn (<popcorn/>) for each $5 they have.
help.material.movieCard.finalShowing.des: This card indicates that this round is the final round. Once the last player has finished their Showings Phase, players' scores will be computed and the game will end.
help.material.movieCard.price: <s>Price:</s> ${price}{premiersMovie, select, 1{ (incl. +$2 because this is a Premiers row movie)} other{}}
help.material.movieCard.color: <s>Color:</s> <colorSymbol/> <color/> {colorEnum, select, 1{(Comedies let you grow your audience more frequently.)} 2{(Action movies let you gain Popcorn more easily.)} 3{(Fantasy and sci-fi movies attract demanding Guests (and help you manage your bag and Guests).)} 4{(Drama and arthouse movies help you gain more money and Award cards.)} other{}}
help.material.movieCard.bonusAction: <s>Showing bonus:</s> <p1/><p2/> = <p3/> When bought, if this movie is shown in a {numberOfSeats, select, 1{one seat} 2{two seats} 3{three seats} other{}} theater: <bonusActionDescription/>
help.material.movieCard.action.advertisi: Place 1 of your Advertising tokens on the corresponding space of the Advertising board. There is no limit to the number of tokens that can be on the same space.
help.material.movieCard.action.audienceT: Move your audience cube 1 space to the right
help.material.movieCard.action.drawAward: Draw 2 Award cards, keep 1 with out showing it to your opponents, then place the other face down under the deck
help.material.movieCard.action.drawGuest: Draw 1 Guest from your bag and place it on a seat that hasn’t yet been activated this showing. If you place it on a seat that already has a Guest, move the replaced (and unactivated) Guest to your exit zone
help.material.movieCard.action.placeExit: Choose 1 Guest in your exit zone and add it to your bag
help.material.movieCard.action.placeGues: Choose 1 Guest in your cinema (in a theater or your exit zone, but not in your bag) and place it in the reserve
help.material.movieCard.premiersShowingB: <s>Premiers row showing bonus:</s> When you buy a Premier movie, immediately gain 1 {colorEnum, select, 1{yellow} 2{red} 3{green} 4{blue} other{}} Guest from the reserve, and add it to your bag. If the reserve is empty, take it from any other player’s exit zone. If there are none available, nothing happens.
help.material.popcornCup.title: {player}'s Popcorn cup
help.material.popcornCup.description: This cup holds the Popcorn tokens <popcorn/> {isMe, select, true{you} other{{player}}} obtained during the game.
help.material.popcornToken.title: Popcorn token
help.material.popcornToken.description: This token represents {amount} Popcorn. At the end of the game, the player with the most Popcorn wins the game.
help.material.premiersTile.title: Premiers tile
help.material.premiersTile.description:
This tile indicates movies that are Premier movie for this round. If you buy a movie from the Premiers row, the cost is +$2 to what is shown on the card. When you buy a Premier movie, immediately gain 1 Guest of the movie's color from the reserve, and add it to your bag. If the reserve is empty, take it from any other player’s exit zone. If there are none available, nothing happens.

Movies in this row move to the features row during the end of the round
help.material.theaterTile.type: {numberOfSeats, select, 1{One seat} 2{Two seats} 3{Three seat} other{}} theater tile
help.material.theaterTile.description.ac: <s>Number of accomodated guests:</s> {numberOfGuests, plural, =1{# Guest} other{# Guests}}
help.material.theaterTile.action.drawGue: Draw 1 Guest from your bag and place it on a seat that hasn’t yet been activated this showing. If you place it on a seat that already has a Guest, move the replaced (and unactivated) Guest to your exit zone
help.material.theaterTile.action.moveGue: Choose 1 Guest in your exit zone and add it to your bag
help.material.theaterTile.action.movieAc: Use 1 available Movie action on the movie showing in this theater that hasn’t been used yet this round
help.material.theaterTile.action.placeGu: Choose 1 Guest in your cinema (in a theater or your exit zone, but not in your bag) and place it in the reserve
help.material.topCinemaBoard.title: {player}'s Cinema board
help.material.topCinemaBoard.description: This is {player}'s cinema board. This is where {player} will slide their Movie cards and place their Theater tiles.
The right theater is empty. When {player} places their first Theater tile in the right theater, they will move their Audience cube (<cube/>) 1 spot on the audience track.
<s><audience/>Audience:</s> {audience}. {player} will draw {audience} Guests (<guest/>) from their bag at the beginning of the next Showings Phase.
log.buyingAndAdvertisingPhase.buyMovieCa: {player} buys <newMovieLink/> from the {row, select, featuresRowSpot{Features} premiersRowSpot{Premiers} other{}}  row for ${price}{isShowingsBonus, select, true{,} other{ and}} places it in their <theater/>{isReplacingOtherMovie, select, true{ replacing <oldMovie/>} other{}} {isShowingsBonus, select, true{, earning the showing bonus <actionSymbol/>} other{}}
log.buyingAndAdvertisingPhase.buyTheater: {player} buys <tile/> for ${price}{isFirstRightTheaterTile, select, true{,} other { and}} places it in their {destinationSpot, select, 0{left} 1{center} 2{right} other{}} theater{replacePreviousTile, select, true{, replacing their <oldTileLink>previous tile</oldTileLink>} other{}}{isFirstRightTheaterTile, select, true{, and gains <audienceAdvanceSymbol/> as it is their first tile in the right theater} other{}}
log.buyingAndAdvertisingPhase.guestMoveT: {player} picks <guest/> from {origin, select, guestPawnReserveSpot{the reserve} other{{isOwnExitZone, select, true{their} other{{otherPlayer}'s}} Exit zone}} and places it in their bag{isPremiersRowGuest, select, true{ since {player} bought <movie/> from the Premiers row} other{}}
log.buyingAndAdvertisingPhase.startPhase: Beginning of the {isFinalRound, select, true{<s>last} other{}} Buying & Advertising phase {isFinalRound, select, true{</s>} other{}}
log.buyingAndAdvertisingPhase.whiteGuest: {player} picks <guest/> from {origin, select, guestPawnReserveSpot{the reserve} other{their Exit zone}} and puts it in {isOwnBag, select, true{their} other{{destinationPlayer}'s}} bag
log.common.audienceCubeAdvance: {player} advances their <cube/> to the next spot on the track{isNewAudience, select, true{. {player}'s new audience is <audience/>} other{}}
log.common.drawAwardCards: {player} draws <cards/> from the Award cards deck{isAudienceBonus, select, true{ as their audience track bonus} other{}}
log.common.earnMoneyOrPopcorn: {player} gets {type, select, moneyTokens{${amount}} popcornTokens{{amount} Popcorn} other{}} ( <symbol/> ){isAudienceBonus, select, true{ as their audience track bonus} other{}}
log.common.guestsSentToExitZone: <guests/> cannot be used to perform their Seat Action nor Movie Action so {player} sends them to their Exit zone
log.common.guestSentToReserve: {player} sends <guest/> to the Guest pawn Reserve
log.common.placeAdvertisingToken: {player} places <token/> on the <tokenSpot/> spot of the advertising board
log.endOfRoundPhase.finalShowingsReveale: The final showing card is revealed. The last Round begins
log.endOfRoundPhase.newFeatureMovies: <featureMovies/> {newMovieCount, plural, =1{is} other{are}} the new Feature {newMovieCount, plural, =1{Movie} other{Movies}}
log.endOfRoundPhase.newFirstPlayer: {player} becomes the first player for this round
log.endOfRoundPhase.premiersToFeatureMov: <newFeatureMovies/> {movieRemovedNumber, plural, =1{moves} other{move}} from the Premiers row to the Features row
log.endOfRoundPhase.removeFeatureMovies: <removedMovies/> {movieRemovedNumber, plural, =1{is} other{are}} removed from the Features row
log.endOfRoundPhase.startPhase: Beginning of the End of Round phase
log.endOfRoundPhase.theatricalRun.lobbyS: Theatrical run: lobby sliders are moved up one space for <movies/>
log.finalEndOfRoundPhase.awardCardPoints: {player} {amount, plural, =0{doesn't gain any} other{gains #}} Popcorn (<popcorn/>) thanks to <awardCard/>
log.finalEndOfRoundPhase.startPhase: The final End of Round phase begins
log.finalEndOfRoundPhase.trophyAwarded: {player} gains the <trophy/> trophy and is awarded {amount} Popcorn (<popcorn/>)
log.showingsPhase.exitZoneGuestsToBagFor: {player} puts all their Guests from their exit zone in their bag since it's empty
log.showingsPhase.guestToExitZone.regula: Then {player} sends <guest/> to their exit zone
log.showingsPhase.guestToExitZone.cannot: <guest/> cannot be used to carry out a Movie Action for <movie/>, so {player} sends it to their exit zone
log.showingsPhase.movieAction: {isSeatAction, select, true{} false{Using <guest/>, } other{}}{player} takes the {movieActionNumber, select, 0{first} 1{second} 2{third} 3{fourth} other{}} Movie Action ( <action/> ) of <movie/>
log.showingsPhase.placeGuest.drawOneGues: {player} draws <guest/> from their bag{destination, select, guestPawnExitZoneSpotOnTopPlayerCinemaBoard{, but cannot place it. {player} sends it to their exit zone} other{}}
log.showingsPhase.placeGuest.firstGuestD: {player}'s audience is {audience, plural, =1{# Guest} other{# Guests}}. {player} draws {numberOfGuestsDrawn, plural, =1{# Guest} other{# Guests}} from their bag: <guests/>

{player}'s audience is {audience, plural, =1{# Guest} other{# Guests}}. {player} draws {numberOfGuestsDrawn, plural, =1{# Guest} other{# Guests}} from their bag: <guests/>. {player} cannot draw anymore Guests as their exit zone is empty
log.showingsPhase.placeGuest.secondGuest: player} draws{existsPreviousShuffleConsequence, plural, =1{ another} other{}} {numberOfGuestsDrawn, plural, =1{# Guest} other{# Guests}} from their bag: <guests/>

{player} draws{existsPreviousShuffleConsequence, plural, =1{ another} other{}} {numberOfGuestsDrawn, plural, =1{# Guest} other{# Guests}} from their bag: <guests/>. {player} cannot draw anymore Guests as their exit zone is empty
log.showingsPhase.placeGuestOnTheaterTil: {player} places <guest/> on the {destinationSeatSpot, select, 0{first} 1{second} 2{third} other{}} seat of their <theater/>{replaceGuest, select, true{ and replaces <previousGuest/>} other{}}
log.showingsPhase.seatAction: Using <guest/>, {player} takes the {seatNumber, select, 0{first} 1{second} 2{third} other{}} Seat Action ( <action/> ) of their <theater/>
log.showingsPhase.startPhase: Beginning of {isFinalRound, select, true{<s>last } other{}}Showings phase{isFinalRound, select, true{</s>} other{}}

material.movieCard.quote.firstMovieBlueR: "It's the name of the sled" Spoiler.com
material.movieCard.quote.firstMovieGreen: The USA will defend us all.
material.movieCard.quote.blueJoeJoe: The griping story of the most famous triangle player in the world.
material.movieCard.quote.blueTheNeurotic: When she walked in, he knew he was going to have a problem.
material.movieCard.quote.blueObjection: Will the evidence arrive in time ?
material.movieCard.quote.blueControlZ: He loved her. He wants to erase her.
material.movieCard.quote.blueRohanAndJay: Just because we're sad doesn't mean we can't dance
material.movieCard.quote.blueTheGodmothe: Don't even mention mental load to her.
material.movieCard.quote.greenBadman: With a different letter, he'd be a hero.
material.movieCard.quote.greenWitchesVsC: Between batons and wands, only one will win.
material.movieCard.quote.greenAbracadab: The prefer magic wands over chemical bonds.
material.movieCard.quote.greenIntergalac: They dream of their first star.
material.movieCard.quote.redTheFuryOfThe: The best jacket in the history of film.
material.movieCard.quote.redTheCursedPeg: Buy 10 tickets get 1 free bottle of rum
material.movieCard.quote.redTheWorldAfte: The hardest part is filling up
material.movieCard.quote.redUnknownDesti: They stole his life, he wants it back.
material.movieCard.quote.redGentlemanDri: The only criminal in history who still has their license.
material.movieCard.quote.redFinalLasso: Even an archeologist can have adventures.
